zh.Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Engla: 英國英格蘭越可爾可廷加姆
英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Cailly於1344年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親John Cailly or Caley29歲，母親Maud De Pateshull21歲。他和Alice de Braose至少有1個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1380年享年36歲。

英国英格兰諾福爾可奧比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Cailly于1344年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲John Cailly or Caley29岁，母亲Maud De Pateshull21岁。他和Alice de Braose至少有1个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1380年享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cailly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghailligh ‘son of Raghailleach’. Compare Crawley .

variants.name: Crawley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Crawley, for example in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Sussex, and Oxfordshire, named with Old English crāwe ‘crow’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Crowley .

Irish (Louth): in Ireland, this is generally the English name in 1 above, but it may also have been adopted for McCrawley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghallaigh ‘son of Raghallach’, also Anglicized as Magreely.

variants.name: Kriley
meanings: Probably an altered form of Irish   Crilly  .

variants.name: Grilley
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Crilly  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Cailly was born in 1344, in Norfolk, England, his father, John Cailly or Caley, was 29 and his mother, Maud De Pateshull, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 7 daughters with Alice de Braose. He died in 1380, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Cailly est né en 1344, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Cailly or Caley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud De Pateshull, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles avec Alice de Braose. Il est décédé en 1380, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Cailly 1344 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cailly or Caley 29 und seine Mutter Maud De Pateshull 21. Er hatte mit Alice de Braose mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Cailly è nato il nel 1344 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Cailly or Caley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud De Pateshull, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie con Alice de Braose. Morì nel 1380, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Caillyが1344年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John Cailly or Caleyは29歳，母Maud De Pateshullは21歳であった。彼はAlice de Braoseとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1380年に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Cailly(이)가 1344년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cailly or Caley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud De Pateshull(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Alice de Braose(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Cailly nasceu em 1344, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cailly or Caley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud De Pateshull, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas com Alice de Braose. Ele faleceu em 1380, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Cailly родился в 1344 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cailly or Caley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud De Pateshull, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей от Alice de Braose. Он умер в 1380 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Cailly nació en 1344, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cailly or Caley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud De Pateshull, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas con Alice de Braose. Murió en 1380, a la edad de 36 años.
